target: 14. Always Together…
Hishigata Tokiko
Hey, Mio…
What's wrong?
Can I stay with Mio forever?

You don't even need to ask.
It's obvious, isn't it?
Really…?

Of course it is.
Haha, stop making such a complicated face.

Hey, you got something on your mind?
If you want, I'll listen.

You always rely on me.
But sometimes I'll be the one you can count on.
Come on, tell me anything.

Hey, Mio.
Do you remember when I got that medal before?
You know, from the swimming club.

Oh, that medal from back then.
Of course I remember.

I was really happy,
and Tokiko was super excited too.
Yeah, I was happy too.

It's not just that you swim fast,
your strokes were really beautiful.
I wanted to watch you forever.
Haha… you're making me blush.
I remember you so well, Mio.

We talked about so many things.
Secrets only we knew.

Even secrets I couldn't tell anyone,
you told me…

That's because it's Tokiko.
I could tell you anything.

Hey, Mio.
If I was hiding something…
What would you think?
Would you hate me?

What are you talking about?
I'd never hate you.

It's because it's Tokiko.
She must be thinking about me,
that's why she's keeping it secret.
Mio…

You don't need to say it.
We're best friends.

Yeah.
You've always been on my side, Mio.

That's why I…
I really like you, Mio.
I like you too, Tokiko.
You didn't say "really like"!

Why are you focusing on that?
It's obvious I really like you.

Haha…
Thank you, Mio.

Haha.
You're welcome.
You're still you, Mio…
Mio, come a bit closer.

Sure.
Come closer.

Today, Tokiko,
you seem different from usual.

You think so?
I don't think so.
But…
I'm getting tired of thinking about everything.
Mio, stay with me forever.

Yeah.
Forever together.
Yeah…
Forever, always…
KEY TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_ROOTCLEAR_TOK>route: Tokiko Hishigata</color>] has been acquired.
